GenAiPlugin.description: Highlight and celebrate sales team milestones and successes. This topic is chosen when acknowledging specific sales achievements.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the query is about recognizing a sales achievement, use Send_Slack_Message_to_Channel.
Always include the sales milestone details in the message.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only recognize and announce sales team achievements. This may include mentioning milestones and sending congratulatory messages.
